patch.note: Recheck the official patch forum before relying on recommendations. Data older than the current patch may be stale.

trade.tos_note: Official API details may change without notice. This app performs at most one user-triggered search POST and opens the official site. No scraping, no polling, no background searches.
trade.deep_link_note: ?q= deep links remain UNVERIFIED as of 2026-07-05. The in-app browser reached the official trade2 route but hit the sign-in gate before query rendering, so the app should keep the user-triggered POST path.

last_validation.test: LEGACY ONLY - Expedition Tablet payload with explicit.stat_1083387327 minimum 15
last_validation.note: Official trade2 search POST accepted the stat-filtered payload. Result IDs were not fetched.

trade.live_note: Live search runs on the OFFICIAL trade site in your browser. The app only opens the URL; it never polls or watches results itself.

confidence_labels.official: Verified from GGG patch notes or official trade2 metadata.
confidence_labels.database: Verified from PoE2DB or poe2wiki, but not official patch text.
confidence_labels.conflict: Sources disagree or wording/value signs do not match.
confidence_labels.unknown: UNKNOWN - NEEDS VERIFICATION. Must not be treated as a real value.

known_gameplay_rules.rule: Expedition Tablets do not exist in the current game.
known_gameplay_rules.app_behavior: Hide Expedition Tablet from active tablet/trade workflows; keep old Expedition tablet rows only as legacy/source-history data.
known_gameplay_rules.data_import_rule: If imported data lists Expedition Tablet, mark it legacy/current_game_available=false and do not re-enable it without explicit owner reversal.

known_gameplay_rules.rule: If current Expedition notes say to juice Expedition, interpret that as other current tablets, map/waystone modifiers, Atlas Master choices, whispers, and remnant order around Expedition content, not Expedition Tablets.
known_gameplay_rules.app_behavior: Show this in Expedition Whispers and keep Expedition Tablet trade filters hidden/legacy.
known_gameplay_rules.data_import_rule: If imported strategy text says Expedition Tablet or old Expedition-specific tablet suffixes, mark those setup rows legacy and add a current-game note pointing to other-tablet/shared juice instead.
